chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | August 30, 2024 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about academic deadlines, upcoming events, and resources available to students. The content aims to keep students informed about important dates and opportunities within the department.

The newsletter covers various categories such as academic news, event announcements, and faculty updates. It serves as a central communication tool to disseminate information efficiently to the student body. Students are encouraged to review the newsletter regularly to stay updated on department activities and requirements.

Open Faculty Positions: The department is actively recruiting for new faculty roles to enhance teaching and research capabilities. Interested candidates can find more details and application instructions through the provided links. This initiative supports the growth and development of the EECS program at Berkeley.
